text:
is a XR game based on Neon Genesis Evangelion TV series. It is being developed by Pixelity Inc.

Overview

It is designed with the latest technology fusing Virtual Reality and Mixed Reality, allowing players to experience the world of Neon Genesis Evangelion as if it were real. Players will be able to step into the anime's world and explore its locations from their own perspective. Battles between Evangelions and Angels, various interactions, and an original side story featuring brand-new characters are also planned.

Characters

Tomohito Yagi
Martin Dasen Holloway
Rimi Okada
Erisa Nozaki
Shogo Yamamoto
Haruki Utsumi

Gallery

 
EVANGELION Δ CROSS REFLECTIONS english teaser 21 February 2025.png|Announcement image
 

Development

An official Neon Genesis Evangelion XR game was announced on 21 February 2025 https://www.eva-info.jp/23364 , to being developed by Pixelity Inc. It was confirmed the first installment is planned as a trilogy "based on the world and events of all 26 episodes". https://pixelityinc.com/news/detail?id=326 

The official title EVANGELION: Δ CROSS REFLECTIONS was announced on 05 September 2025. Players will take on the role of a NERV trainee who dreams of becoming an Evangelion pilot, and will be able to experience battles between Evangelions and Angels, various interactive elements, and an alternate storyline featuring original characters. The project will be composed of three parts, and in this first installment, players will enjoy both key episodes from the original anime and original game-exclusive storylines, focusing on the events spanning Episodes 1 through 11 of the series. A special demo version that allows players to experience actual content is planned for release in the first half of 2026.
 https://pixelityinc.com/news/detail?id=337
